creator: mm@FreeBSD.org
text:
On 26.11.2012 15:52, Chris Rees wrote:
>
> Perhaps Martin should comment before moving tcl-modules?  He may wish
> to keep it.
>
I agree to this PR, making a abstracted maintainer is a good idea, as
long as there is someone behind the e-mail :)
I focus on maintaining stuff I really intensively use (so I can catch
some of its bugs, too) and tcl/tk is currently not really on my list.
A good example here is horde@freebsd.org - let's say atm. I am the only
active person there

Cheers,
mm

-- 
Martin Matuska
FreeBSD committer
http://blog.vx.sk
